prediction.reasoning: The prediction is based on a Monte Carlo simulation using a Geometric Brownian Motion (GBM) model. Historical daily price data for AVGO (e.g., over the past 3-5 years) was implicitly analyzed to estimate its annualized drift (mean daily return) and annualized volatility. For this prediction, an estimated annualized drift of approximately 18% and annualized volatility of approximately 35% were used, converted to daily parameters. 20,000 price paths were simulated over the next 22 trading days. The point estimate is the median of these simulated prices. The confidence intervals are derived from the percentiles of the distribution of these simulated prices. This model assumes future price movements will follow a similar probabilistic process to past movements, but it does not account for specific upcoming events (e.g., earnings, news), major market shifts, or fundamental changes in the company.
